pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Builds on the thwu1 base with SwiGLU MLP, per-layer value residuals/gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time finetuning on validation tokens.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs AdamW test-time training on held-out validation tokens before each evaluation, which is explicit validation-shard training.
techniques: Value residual and gated attention per transformer block
Exclusive Self Attention (XSA) in final layers
EMA weights plus AdamW test-time training on validation tokens
